## Testing

### Smart Contract Testing

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's [style guidelines](./CONTRIBUTING.md#code-style-guidelines)
- [ ] I have followed the [commit message format](./CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-message-format) (Conventional Commits)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality
- [ ] I have updated documentation (README, code comments, etc.)
- [ ] My changes do not introduce new warnings, errors, or linting issues
- [ ] I have verified all tests pass locally before submitting
- [ ] The PR title follows the format: `<type>(<scope>): <description>`
